title: Amendment in the fee for practicing under Chartered Accountants Act, 1949
description: Amendment in the fee for practicing under Chartered Accountants Act, 1949

Pdmui ; 7^ 3rf?TC£cRT, w f a ^ 1 ^ ifoki'd.'^ m^H ^\ -rft^^ft ^RT 3#-rfWT qfft *TTCT 6 3ft S^-mj (2) ^ 3f#T ifetf ^ w i ^ ^ %TI -qftrr 3ic?*nfai ?frd i§ TRT^T ^ ^ , ^ n ^ ^RfefT (TT#«R) srfafwr, 2006 ^ srci ^rf^ H ^ f e a STWWT, 1949 ^ ^#*R ^ spprcnT 3 *ttf 3ft ^ i 1 ^ T ^ i^i^'iy j f m , 1988 ^ ^ r a ^wrf *f THE INSTITUTE OF CHARTERED ACCOUNTANTS OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th March, 2008 (CHARTERED ACCOUNTANTS) No. l-CA(7)/ll 1/2008.—Whereas, the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949) has been amended by the Chartered Accountants (Amendment) Act, 2006 (9 of 2006); 853 O/2008 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] And, whereas, the Council of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India has been empowered to determine, under sub-section (2) of Section 6 of the said Act, the fee payable for a certificate of practice; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by said sub-section (2) of Section 6 of the said Act, the Council hereby determines that,— with effect from the 1 st day of April, 2008, the annual fee payable by a member for his certificate of practice shall be rupees one thousand six hundred only : Provided that such fee for a member, who has attained the age of 65 years as on the 1 st day of April of the relevant year, shall be rupees one thousand two hundred only. Dr. ASHOK HALDIA, Secy. [AD VT ffl/IV/104/2007/Exty.] Note : This notification is issued pursuant to amendment to Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 by the Chartered Accountants (Amendment) Act, 2006 empowering the Council of the Institute to determine under sub-section (2) of Section 6 of the said Act the fee for certificate of practice. The consequent amendments to the relevant provisions of the Chartered Accountants Regulations, 1988 are underway. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
